steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of Nokia Oyj dividend withholding from 13.5% to 15% under FI-NO treaty
Submit Vero refund application Form 6163e/6167e for corporate client or 6164e for individual to recover EUR 3,607.50 excess withholding
Provide Nordea with Finnish tax authority guidance on correct 15% treaty rate for Norwegian residents

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
Vero – Payments of Dividends to Nonresidents
